title: rorella rotundifolia
intro: Rorella rotundifolia, also known as the Round-leaved Rorella or Rotund-leaved Rorella, is a species of flowering plant in the family Epacridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rorella rotundifolia include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Rorella rotundifolia can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant as a topical cream to soothe skin irritations.
